title: elaphoglossum savaiense
intro: Elaphoglossum savaiense is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as promote wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Elaphoglossum savaiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments for topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
